name: ST7701S Display Driver
description: This display driver supports displays with 16 bit parallel interfaces, often referred to as "RGB". It currently supports the ST7701S chip.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Data Pins
config_entries.description: A list of pins used for the databus. Specified in 3 groups.

config_entries.label: Blue
config_entries.description: Exactly 5 pin numbers for the blue databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: Green
config_entries.description: Exactly 6 pin numbers for the green databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: Red
config_entries.description: Exactly 5 pin numbers for the red databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: DC Pin
config_entries.description: The DC pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: De Pin
config_entries.description: The DE pin.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Dimensions
config_entries.description: Dimensions of the screen, specified either as *width* **x** *height* (e.g `320x240`  ) or with separate config keys.

config_entries.label: Height
config_entries.description: Specifies height of display in pixels.

config_entries.label: Width
config_entries.description: Specifies width of display.

config_entries.label: Offset Height
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the y-direction of the display. Default is 0.

config_entries.label: Offset Width
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the x-direction of the display, typically used when an LCD is smaller than the maximum supported by the driver chip. Default is 0

config_entries.label: HSYNC Pin
config_entries.description: The Horizontal sync pin.

config_entries.label: VSYNC Pin
config_entries.description: The Vertical sync pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: If the display should be cleared before each update. Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Color Order
config_entries.description: Should be one of `bgr` (default) or `rgb`.

config_entries.label: Data Rate
config_entries.description: Set the data rate of the SPI interface to the display. One of `80MHz`, `40MHz`, `20MHz`, `10MHz`, `5MHz`, `2MHz`, `1MHz` (default), `200kHz`, `75kHz` or `1kHz`.

config_entries.label: HSYNC Back Porch
config_entries.description: The horizontal back porch length.

config_entries.label: HSYNC Front Porch
config_entries.description: The horizontal front porch length.

config_entries.label: HSYNC Pulse Width
config_entries.description: The horizontal sync pulse width.

config_entries.label: Init Sequence
config_entries.description: Specifies the init sequence for the display

config_entries.label: Invert Colors
config_entries.description: With this boolean option you can invert the display colors. **Note** some of the displays have this option set automatically to true and can't be changed.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: PCLK Frequency
config_entries.description: Set the pixel clock speed. Default is 8MHz.

config_entries.label: PCLK Inverted
config_entries.description: If the pclk is active negative (default is True)

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Rotate the display presentation in software. Choose one of `0°`, `90°`, `180°`, or `270°`. This option cannot be used with `transform`.

config_entries.label: SPI Mode
config_entries.description: Set the mode for the SPI interface to the display. Default is `MODE0` but some displays require `MODE3`.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: Transform the display presentation using hardware. All defaults are `false`. This option cannot be used with `rotation`.

config_entries.label: Mirror X
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the x axis.

config_entries.label: Mirror Y
config_entries.description: If true, mirror the y axis.

config_entries.label: VSYNC Back Porch
config_entries.description: The vertical back porch length.

config_entries.label: VSYNC Front Porch
config_entries.description: The vertical front porch length.

config_entries.label: VSYNC Pulse Width
config_entries.description: The vertical sync pulse width.
